creator: noway@nohow.demon.co.uk
text:
On Fri, 23 Jun 2000 esk@ira.uka.de wrote:

> I believe that the audio/x11amp port is very obsolete now.  X11amp changed
> its name to Xmms ages ago, and no real update has been done to the port
> since late '98.

However, it still works nicely and is much smaller than xmms.  Why fix
what isn't broken?

-- 
Jose Marques
